\section{Professional Summary}
Software Development Engineer with \textbf{3 years} of experience in \textbf{Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC)}, \textbf{SOA Suite}, and \textbf{VBCS}, designing scalable integrations and event-driven architectures. Proven expertise in \textbf{REST/SOAP APIs}, \textbf{BPEL}, \textbf{XSLT}, and \textbf{Gen AI} automation, with strong root cause analysis and system reliability focus. Adept at delivering end-to-end integration solutions across \textbf{ERP}, \textbf{HCM}, \textbf{OFS Cloud}, and \textbf{OCI} platforms.
